name: techdoc-search-and-orchestrate
description: 【强制】所有技术文档查询必须使用本技能，禁止在主对话中直接使用 mcp__context7-mcp 工具。触发关键词：查询/学习/了解某个库或框架的文档、API用法、配置参数、错误解释、版本差异、代码示例、最佳实践。本技能通过 context7-researcher agent 执行查询，避免大量文档内容污染主对话上下文，保持 token 效率。
capabilities: Detects when user needs technical documentation for libraries or frameworks
Delegates documentation queries to context7-researcher agent via Task tool
Orchestrates multiple parallel documentation queries for independent topics
Sequentially executes dependent queries where answers require prior context
Maintains clean main conversation by isolating documentation retrieval
securitySummary: All static findings are false positives. The skill is a pure orchestration layer that delegates to another agent using Task tool. No network calls, file operations, or command execution occur. Static scanner misidentified markdown code fences as shell backticks and UTF-8 Chinese text as encrypted content.
valueStatement: Technical documentation queries often clutter conversation context with large text blocks. This skill routes all documentation requests to a specialized agent, keeping your main conversation clean and token-efficient while ensuring accurate, context-aware responses.
limitations: Requires Context7 MCP server to be available and configured
Cannot answer questions about proprietary or non-indexed documentation
Does not provide real-time updates to documentation content
Relies on the context7-researcher agent for actual document retrieval

useCases.targetUser: Developers building applications who need accurate API references
useCases.title: Library API Reference Lookup
useCases.description: Quickly retrieve API documentation for libraries like Supabase, Next.js, or Express without clogging your conversation with documentation text.

useCases.title: Multi-Framework Comparison
useCases.description: Compare documentation across multiple frameworks or versions side by side by running parallel queries for independent topics.

useCases.title: Error Resolution Research
useCases.description: Debug errors by first researching the root cause, then finding solutions based on that context - all handled through sequential agent orchestration.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Documentation Query
promptTemplates.prompt: Query the documentation for {library_or_framework} to find information about {specific_feature_or_api}.
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need a specific piece of information from a library's docs

promptTemplates.title: Code Example Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Find code examples in {library_name} documentation showing how to {specific_task}.
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need practical implementation examples

promptTemplates.title: Parallel Documentation Search
promptTemplates.prompt: Run parallel queries to research: 1) {topic_1} from {library_a} docs, 2) {topic_2} from {library_b} docs, 3) {topic_3} from {library_c} docs. Present findings side by side for comparison.
promptTemplates.scenario: When comparing features across multiple libraries simultaneously

promptTemplates.title: Sequential Debugging Research
promptTemplates.prompt: First query {library} documentation to understand {error_component}, then use that context to find how to {solution_pattern}. Explain the relationship between the error and the solution.
promptTemplates.scenario: When troubleshooting errors where understanding requires layered research

bestPractices: Break down broad documentation queries into specific topics to enable parallel execution
Use sequential queries only when answers are genuinely dependent on prior results
Let the orchestration skill handle the agent delegation rather than calling Context7 MCP directly
antiPatterns: Making multiple unrelated documentation queries in a single prompt instead of parallel agents
Calling context7-researcher directly from main conversation instead of routing through this skill
Querying proprietary or paid documentation that Context7 MCP cannot access

faq.question: Why should I use this skill instead of calling Context7 MCP directly?
faq.answer: This skill prevents documentation text from polluting your main conversation context. It orchestrates queries efficiently and keeps your conversation history clean and token-efficient.

faq.question: What is Context7 MCP?
faq.answer: Context7 MCP is a Model Context Protocol server that provides access to up-to-date technical documentation for popular libraries and frameworks through a standardized interface.

faq.question: When should I use parallel vs sequential execution?
faq.answer: Use parallel execution when queries are independent. Use sequential execution only when you need the answer from one query to formulate the next query, such as error debugging scenarios.

faq.question: What libraries and frameworks does Context7 support?
faq.answer: Context7 supports major open source libraries and frameworks. Check the Context7 MCP documentation for the current list of supported libraries and their documentation versions.

faq.question: Can this skill handle real-time documentation updates?
faq.answer: This skill retrieves documentation from Context7 MCP's indexed content. While the content is regularly updated, it may not reflect the very latest commits or release candidates.

faq.question: Does this skill require any additional configuration?
faq.answer: Yes, the Context7 MCP server must be configured and available in your environment for this skill to function correctly.
